title: Hoofdstuk 19 - HTML + CSS Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Stylesheets linken en waar CSS voor dient.

questions.prompt: Welke Their They Their They Their They Their

explanations.overview: Gebruik Their They Their They Their They

byOptionId.link: Correct â€” <link rel="stylesheet"> in <head> loads external CSS.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect â€” <style> contains inline CSS, not an external link.
byOptionId.script: Incorrect â€” <script> loads JS, not CSS.
byOptionId.css: Incorrect â€” <css> is not a valid HTML tag.

options.label: Controls look and layout (colors, fonts, spacing)

explanations.overview: CSS handles presentation while HTML handles structure.

byOptionId.presentation: Correct â€” CSS controls presentation like colors, layout, and fonts.
byOptionId.data: Incorrect â€” CSS is not for storing user data.
byOptionId.server: Incorrect â€” CSS runs in the browser, not on the server.
byOptionId.html: Incorrect â€” CSS complements HTML but does not replace structure.
